subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-11-10
subcodes.first_line: What is the reality of Divinity, or what do we understand by God? When we consider the world of existence
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @creation of the world, @knowledge; recognition of God, @things are known by their opposites, @call to action, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
